EX11 Cigarette Active to Active Replenishment Configuration Guide Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u EX11 Configuration PAGEREF _Toc64030237 \h 3 1.1 Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control, C-000-EX11 Extension Control PAGEREF _Toc64030238 \h 3 1.1.1 Add C-000-000 Global Extension PAGEREF _Toc64030239 \h 3 1.1.2 Add C-000-EX11 Code ID PAGEREF _Toc64030240 \h 4 1.2 Add B-331 Byte 99-99 EX11 Unstamped Active PDZ PAGEREF _Toc64030241 \h 5 1.3 Add B-325 Byte 1-1 EX11 Allocation Type PAGEREF _Toc64030242 \h 6 1.4 Add S-590 Code ID 92 Cig Act2Actv Replen PAGEREF _Toc64030243 \h 7 1.5 Add Inventory Need Type 99 PAGEREF _Toc64030244 \h 8 1.5.1 Navigate to the Inventory Need Types UI PAGEREF _Toc64030245 \h 8 1.6 Add Allocation Parameters PAGEREF _Toc64030246 \h 9 1.6.1 Navigate to the Allocation Parameters UI PAGEREF _Toc64030247 \h 9 1.7 Add Allocation Priorities PAGEREF _Toc64030248 \h 10 1.7.1 Navigate to the Allocation Priorities UI PAGEREF _Toc64030249 \h 10 1.8 Add Task Creation Rules for Active to Active PAGEREF _Toc64030250 \h 11 1.8.1 Navigate to the Task Creation Rules UI PAGEREF _Toc64030251 \h 11 1.9 Add EX11 Custom System Code PAGEREF _Toc64030252 \h 12 1.9.1 Navigate to the System Codes UI PAGEREF _Toc64030253 \h 12 1.10 Add EX11 RF Changes Transaction Parameters on Pck iLPN Frm Actv – CIG transaction PAGEREF _Toc64030254 \h 13 1.10.1 Navigate to the Transaction Parameters UI PAGEREF _Toc64030255 \h 13 EX11 Configuration Follow below steps to configure EX11 Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control, C-000-EX11 Extension Control Add C-000-000 Global Extension Open System Codes UI Select Add and input the below information “Save” Select Parameters Click “Add” and input the below information “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Add” and input below information then “Save” Select C-000-000 Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Add C-000-EX11 Code ID Remain in System Codes UI “Code ID” section Click “Add” and input below information then “Save” Select C-000-EX11 Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Add B-331 Byte 99-99 EX11 Unstamped Active PDZ Add B-331 Byte 9 9 -9 9 EX 1 1 Unstamped Active PDZ Open System Codes UI Filter for B-331 Pick Location Determination Zones Click Parameters Select Parameters Click “Add” and input the below information “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Edit” and check the respective pdz for inventory conversion below then “Save” Add B-325 Byte 1-1 EX11 Allocation Type Add B-3 25 Byte 1-1 EX 1 1 Allocation Type Open System Codes UI Filter for B-325 Allocation types Select Parameters Click “Add” and input the below information “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Edit” and check the respective pdz for inventory conversion below then “Save” You will have to go through every single slow moving Code ID attribute and make sure the “value” box is checked. (Slow movers are all the low case Code IDs) Add S-590 Code ID 92 Cig Act2Actv Replen Add S -590 Code ID 50 Cig Act2Actv Replen Open System Codes UI Filter for S-590 Task Types Click Code Ids Click “Add” and input the below information “Save Add Inventory Need Type 99 Navigate to the Inventory Need Types UI Select Add and input the below information “Save” Add Allocation Parameters Navigate to the Allocation Parameters UI Select Add and input the below information “Save” Add Allocation Priorities Navigate to the Allocation Priorities UI Select Add and input the below information (based off of the PDZ you are using) “Save” Add Task Creation Rules for Active to Active Navigate to the Task Creation Rules UI Select Add and input the below information for the definition tab Next click on the parameters tab and input the below information Click Save" Add EX11 Custom System Code Navigate to the System Codes UI Select Add and populate the below information (Code Type=E11,Code Description=EX11 Cigarette iLPN Size, RF Desc=EX11 Ctrl, Code length=3) Save Select Parameters Select Add Populated below information Save, return to System Code main menu, select E11 sys code, select Code IDs Select Add, populated as below Select Parameters tab, input 30 – this determines how many cigarette SKUs can fit into a standard cigarette iLPN, as of now that number is 30. This can be configured here if that changes in future. Save Add EX11 RF Changes Transaction Parameters on Pck iLPN Frm Actv – CIG transaction Navigate to the Transaction P arameters UI Search for Pck iLPN Frm Actv – CIG Select transaction, select Program Template Select Add and populate following information Select Save Navigate back to transaction parameters Select Pck iLPN Frm Actv - CIG transaction Select Edit, enable byte 503-503 EX11 Enable RF Changes Our active-to-active Pck iLPN Frm Actv transaction should have both EX01 and EX11 enabled Save

EX11 Cigarette Active to Active Replenishment Configuration Guide Contents  EX11 Configuration  1.1 Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control, C-000-EX11 Extension Control  1.1.1 Add C-000-000 Global Extension  1.1.2 Add C-000-EX11 Code ID  1.2 Add B-331 Byte 99-99 EX11 Unstamped Active PDZ  1.3 Add B-325 Byte 1-1 EX11 Allocation Type  1.4 Add S-590 Code ID 92 Cig Act2Actv Replen  1.5 Add Inventory Need Type 99  1.5.1 Navigate to the Inventory Need Types UI  1.6 Add Allocation Parameters  1.6.1 Navigate to the Allocation Parameters UI  1.7 Add Allocation Priorities  1.7.1 Navigate to the Allocation Priorities UI  1.8 Add Task Creation Rules for Active to Active  1.8.1 Navigate to the Task Creation Rules UI  1.9 Add EX11 Custom System Code  1.9.1 Navigate to the System Codes UI  1.10 Add EX11 RF Changes Transaction Parameters on Pck iLPN Frm Actv – CIG transaction  1.10.1 Navigate to the Transaction Parameters UI  EX11 Configuration Follow below steps to configure EX11 Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control, C-000-EX11 Extension Control Add C-000-000 Global Extension Open System Codes UI Select Add and input the below information “Save” Select Parameters Click “Add” and input the below information “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Add” and input below information then “Save” Select C-000-000 Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Add C-000-EX11 Code ID Remain in System Codes UI “Code ID” section Click “Add” and input below information then “Save” Select C-000-EX11 Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Add B-331 Byte 99-99 EX11 Unstamped Active PDZ Add B-331 Byte 9 9 -9 9 EX 1 1 Unstamped Active PDZ Open System Codes UI Filter for B-331 Pick Location Determination Zones Click Parameters Select Parameters Click “Add” and input the below information “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Edit” and check the respective pdz for inventory conversion below then “Save” Add B-325 Byte 1-1 EX11 Allocation Type Add B-3 25 Byte 1-1 EX 1 1 Allocation Type Open System Codes UI Filter for B-325 Allocation types Select Parameters Click “Add” and input the below information “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Edit” and check the respective pdz for inventory conversion below then “Save” You will have to go through every single slow moving Code ID attribute and make sure the “value” box is checked.

llocation types Select Parameters Click “Add” and input the below information “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Edit” and check the respective pdz for inventory conversion below then “Save” You will have to go through every single slow moving Code ID attribute and make sure the “value” box is checked.

(Slow movers are all the low case Code IDs) Add S-590 Code ID 92 Cig Act2Actv Replen Add S -590 Code ID 50 Cig Act2Actv Replen Open System Codes UI Filter for S-590 Task Types Click Code Ids Click “Add” and input the below information “Save Add Inventory Need Type 99 Navigate to the Inventory Need Types UI Select Add and input the below information “Save” Add Allocation Parameters Navigate to the Allocation Parameters UI Select Add and input the below information “Save” Add Allocation Priorities Navigate to the Allocation Priorities UI Select Add and input the below information (based off of the PDZ you are using) “Save” Add Task Creation Rules for Active to Active Navigate to the Task Creation Rules UI Select Add and input the below information for the definition tab Next click on the parameters tab and input the below information Click Save" Add EX11 Custom System Code Navigate to the System Codes UI Select Add and populate the below information (Code Type=E11,Code Description=EX11 Cigarette iLPN Size, RF Desc=EX11 Ctrl, Code length=3) Save Select Parameters Select Add Populated below information Save, return to System Code main menu, select E11 sys code, select Code IDs Select Add, populated as below Select Parameters tab, input 30 – this determines how many cigarette SKUs can fit into a standard cigarette iLPN, as of now that number is 30. This can be configured here if that changes in future. Save Add EX11 RF Changes Transaction Parameters on Pck iLPN Frm Actv – CIG transaction Navigate to the Transaction P arameters UI Search for Pck iLPN Frm Actv – CIG Select transaction, select Program Template Select Add and populate following information Select Save Navigate back to transaction parameters Select Pck iLPN Frm Actv - CIG transaction Select Edit, enable byte 503-503 EX11 Enable RF Changes Our active-to-active Pck iLPN Frm Actv transaction should have both EX01 and EX11 enabled Save
